# Pull Request

## 📝 Title

`[type-issue#]: brief description` (types: feat | fix | refactor | chore)

## 🎯 Summary

- [ ] What changed
- [ ] Why it matters

## 📋 Changes

- [ ] Key change 1
- [ ] Key change 2

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm run dev`
- [ ] Manual checks: add 2-3 steps specific to this PR

## 🔗 Related

- Closes #issue-number

## ✅ Ready

- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] No breaking changes
